title: dasypogonaceae
intro: Dasypogonaceae is a family of plants that belongs to the taxonomical rank below order and above genus. It is a family of flowering plants known for their distinctive characteristics and growth habits. The Dasypogonaceae family consists of approximately 14 species, which are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. This family is notable for its diverse range of species, including the genus Dasypogon, which is characterized by its unique, leafy stems and inflorescences.
